headline: TASK-046 is the live v4.0 frontier after 3.9.0.

current_state.operating_goal: Define the v4.0 visibility architecture, visual grammar, and plugin boundary above the shipped v3.9 operator progress layer.
current_state.next_value_slice: Specify v4.0 as the visual grammar, layout contract, and plugin boundary for operator-facing visibility.

primary_frontier_task.title: Define v4.0 visibility architecture, visual grammar, and plugin boundary for operator surfaces

why_now.summary: TASK-046 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
reasons: The active release baseline is 3.9.0 and the runtime is now targeting v4.0.
The current operating goal and next value slice both point at a compact operator briefing layer rather than more viewer-first work.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-046: Define v4.0 visibility architecture, visual grammar, and plugin boundary for operator surfaces
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.

operator_answers.what_is_happening_now: TASK-046 is the current frontier and the runtime is in implementation-ready.
operator_answers.why_this_state: TASK-046 is the best current frontier because it matches the live post-release goal surface and no stronger truth conflict is active.
operator_answers.what_is_blocked: No critical truth conflict is currently blocking the frontier.
